bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Daggers and staff are killing us in close/medium range — we're over-deferring to flanks (15 ticks), getting caught mid-circle. Lower flankMaxDeferTicks to 10 to commit sooner. KiteRangeBias is already at 3 (good), but dodgeEagerness can be slightly raised to 0.95 for better evasion against instant-c

lessons: Bow wins decisively (7-0) in round 150 when facing only sword users — prioritize engagements when sword prevalence >70% and staff/daggers <10%.
Staff users (HexMind, Reaper) killed us in 3 of last 5 deaths — avoid open areas and line-of-sight engagements; they outrange and outdamage bow.
Daggers users (Viper) killed us in round 151 — they close distance instantly; never engage if Viper is visible without a shield or terrain cover.
Shield users appear in 7 of last 10 rounds (avg. 120+ sightings) — bow damage is negated; retreat or flank when shield count exceeds 30% of enemy weapons.
GhostProtocol and Scorpion are top killers against us (83 and 2 kills in last 10 rounds) — retreat immediately on sight, especially if they carry bow or grapple.
Teleport_surge and fast_zone modifiers increase our death rate (8 deaths in 2 rounds) — avoid aggressive play under these modifiers; stay near cover.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (10/64) among all weapons and consistently outperforms bow against high-threat opponents like HexMind and Reaper who dominate our recent deaths.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Staff is dying to sword and bow in open areas — lowering threat aversion from 110→100 and posture from defensive→balanced allows more selective aggression instead of passive evasion. Reducing kiteRangeBias from 2→1 closes distance slightly to reduce exposure to bows while still avoiding sword melee

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow wins are strong only when unopposed — recent deaths (3x bow kills in last 6 rounds) show we're being out-ranged or closed down. Increasing kiteRangeBias to 2.5 creates critical separation from enemy bows and grapples. Raising threatAversion to 105 further avoids high-threat sword/grapple ganks c

lessons: Executioner (sword) killed us in 4 of last 5 rounds — retreat or bunker immediately on sight, especially when sword sightings exceed 40.
Bow sightings exceeded 1000 in round 149 and 69+ in rounds 151–154 — avoid open areas and high-visibility zones when bow sightings exceed 60.
Staff wins only occurred when sword sightings were below 40 and bow sightings below 100 — switch weapon if either exceeds these thresholds.
Shield users (Fortress in round 154, 132 shield sightings in round 152) survive staff attacks — prioritize disabling shields before engaging sword users.
Reaper (staff) killed us in round 156 — avoid prolonged staff-vs-staff duels; enemy staff users are high-threat when isolated.
Fast_zone modifier had 2 kills but 1 death with bow — use mobility to kite sword users, but avoid clustering in fast_zone due to high enemy density.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Sword has the highest kill efficiency against dominant enemy weapons (sword, bow) and enabled a 7-0 round despite high enemy density, outperforming bow and staff in recent engagements.

lessons: Bow wins collapse when enemy bow sightings exceed 80 — retreat or switch weapons (seen in Rounds 148, 150, 159: 181, 214, 306 bows).
Sword users are vulnerable when sightings are low (<50) — prioritize aggressively (e.g., 5 kills in Round 154 with 91 sword sightings).
Grapple users (Hook, Scorpion) and high-elo bow users (Ranger, NeuralReaper) kill us reliably — avoid open ground and retreat on sight.
Shield sightings exceed 40 in 8 of last 10 rounds — bow is ineffective; switch to grapple or daggers when shields >40 (e.g., Rounds 153, 154: 128, 120 shields).
Fast_zone modifier reduces bow survival — switch weapons or play ultra-defensive under this modifier (seen in Round 157: killed by Ranger with bow).
Executioner and Ranger (both sword/bow) consistently kill us — prioritize eliminating them first when encountered.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple has higher win rate against shield-heavy meta and counters bow users in close quarters, as evidenced by current insight and high effectiveness against sword/bow users.
